codegenHints.executionMode: serial because the workflow mutates shared application state

gherkinPreview:
Feature: Playwright Automation — Staff Seeding & Deletion Flow (UI-Based)
  Ticket: ISE-1565
  Priority: Medium

  Background:
    Given system is initialized

  Scenario: Test case 1 - TC-SEED-01 — Login as Protected Admin: Preconditions: App is running at <https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com > Steps: Navigate to the login page Enter email: adminuserxadminzx@mailinator.com Enter the admin password Click Login / Submit Verify redirect to Dashboard/Home ( /home ) Expected Result: Admin is logged in and redirected to the home dashboard without errors.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 2 - TC-SEED-02 — Navigate to Staff Management Page: Preconditions: Logged in as admin Steps: Navigate to /manage/employees Verify the staff table loads with all existing staff rows Verify the protected admin ( adminzx@maillinator.com ) is visible in the list Expected Result: Staff management page loads, showing all staff members including the protected admin row.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 3 - TC-SEED-03 — Delete All Non-Protected Staff (UI Flow): Preconditions: On /manage/employees , at least 1 non-protected staff member exists Steps: For each staff row in the table: a. Check if the email matches adminzx@maillinator.com — if yes, skip b. If not protected, click the Delete icon/button on that row c. Wait for the confirmation dialog to appear d. Click Confirm / Yes in the dialog e. Wait for success toast / row removal Repeat until all non-protected staff are deleted Verify only the protected admin row remains Expected Result: All 6 non-protected staff members are deleted. Protected admin row is untouched and still visible. Critical Constraint: Under no circumstances should the script delete adminzx@maillinator.com .
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 4 - TC-SEED-04 — Protected Admin is Never Deleted: Preconditions: Script is executing the deletion loop Steps: Script evaluates each row's email against the protected list When the protected admin email is found, the delete action is skipped entirely After full deletion loop completes, confirm protected admin still appears in staff table Expected Result: Protected admin account remains intact throughout and after the full deletion loop. No delete action is triggered for this account.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 5 - TC-SEED-05 — Re-create Staff via Add Staff Button (Per User): Preconditions: Non-protected staff have been deleted; on /manage/employees Steps (repeat for each of the 6 staff members): Click the Add Staff button on the staff management page In the Add Staff modal/form, fill in: First Name and Last Name Email Phone Location / School (select from dropdown) Role (District Admin / School Admin / Employee) Type (Teacher) Certified (Yes) Submit / Save the form Verify success toast appears Verify the new staff member row appears in the staff table Expected Result: Each of the 6 staff members is successfully re-created with all correct field values. Success toast confirms creation. Staff table reflects updated count.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 6 - TC-SEED-06 — Verify Full Staff State After Seeding: Preconditions: All 6 staff have been re-created Steps: Reload /manage/employees Count total staff rows — expect 7 For each expected staff member, verify: Name Email Role Location Confirm protected admin is present and unchanged Expected Result: Staff table shows exactly 7 members with all correct data matching the seed dataset. No duplicate or missing entries.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Test case 7 - TC-SEED-07 — Idempotency — Re-run Script on Already-Seeded State: Preconditions: Script has already been run once; all 7 staff exist Steps: Run the seed script again Script detects existing non-protected users and deletes them Script re-creates all 6 staff again Verify final state is 7 staff (1 protected + 6 re-created) Expected Result: Script is idempotent — running it multiple times always results in the same clean 7-user state without errors or duplicates.
    When test executes
    Then result is recorded

  Scenario: Acceptance criteria 1
    [ ] Script logs in successfully as the protected admin

  Scenario: Acceptance criteria 2
    [ ] All 6 non-protected staff are deleted via UI delete flow

riskMatrix.mitigation: Add retry logic, increase wait times

testPlan.sourceSteps: Preconditions: App is running at <https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com > Steps: Navigate to the login page Enter email: adminuserxadminzx@mailinator.com Enter the admin password Click Login / Submit Verify redirect to Dashboard/Home ( /home ) Expected Result: Admin is logged in and redirected to the home dashboard without errors.

Preconditions: Logged in as admin Steps: Navigate to /manage/employees Verify the staff table loads with all existing staff rows Verify the protected admin ( adminzx@maillinator.com ) is visible in the list Expected Result: Staff management page loads, showing all staff members including the protected admin row.

Preconditions: On /manage/employees , at least 1 non-protected staff member exists Steps: For each staff row in the table: a. Check if the email matches adminzx@maillinator.com — if yes, skip b. If not protected, click the Delete icon/button on that row c. Wait for the confirmation dialog to appear d. Click Confirm / Yes in the dialog e. Wait for success toast / row removal Repeat until all non-protected staff are deleted Verify only the protected admin row remains Expected Result: All 6 non-protected staff members are deleted. Protected admin row is untouched and still visible. Critical Constraint: Under no circumstances should the script delete adminzx@maillinator.com .

Preconditions: Script is executing the deletion loop Steps: Script evaluates each row's email against the protected list When the protected admin email is found, the delete action is skipped entirely After full deletion loop completes, confirm protected admin still appears in staff table Expected Result: Protected admin account remains intact throughout and after the full deletion loop. No delete action is triggered for this account.

testPlan.description: Re-create Staff via Add Staff Button (Per User)
testPlan.sourceSteps: Preconditions: Non-protected staff have been deleted; on /manage/employees Steps (repeat for each of the 6 staff members): Click the Add Staff button on the staff management page In the Add Staff modal/form, fill in: First Name and Last Name Email Phone Location / School (select from dropdown) Role (District Admin / School Admin / Employee) Type (Teacher) Certified (Yes) Submit / Save the form Verify success toast appears Verify the new staff member row appears in the staff table Expected Result: Each of the 6 staff members is successfully re-created with all correct field values. Success toast confirms creation. Staff table reflects updated count.

testPlan.description: Verify Full Staff State After Seeding
testPlan.sourceSteps: Preconditions: All 6 staff have been re-created Steps: Reload /manage/employees Count total staff rows — expect 7 For each expected staff member, verify: Name Email Role Location Confirm protected admin is present and unchanged Expected Result: Staff table shows exactly 7 members with all correct data matching the seed dataset. No duplicate or missing entries.

testPlan.description: Idempotency — Re-run Script on Already-Seeded State
testPlan.sourceSteps: Preconditions: Script has already been run once; all 7 staff exist Steps: Run the seed script again Script detects existing non-protected users and deletes them Script re-creates all 6 staff again Verify final state is 7 staff (1 protected + 6 re-created) Expected Result: Script is idempotent — running it multiple times always results in the same clean 7-user state without errors or duplicates.
